title: Phishing Incident: Malicious Domain it-support-portal.net Detected

steps.message: Analyze the domain 'it-support-portal.net' for reputation, creation date, and SSL certificate validity as per WAHH phishing vector guidelines.
Execute Python script to query proxy and mail logs for any traffic or interactions involving 'it-support-portal.net'.
Block the domain 'it-support-portal.net' at the enterprise firewall and DNS level to prevent further victim interaction.
Approve mandatory password reset for all users identified as having clicked the link or provided credentials in the phishing email.
Review Java application source code for 'sendRedirect' and 'addHeader' APIs to ensure no open redirect vulnerabilities were used to facilitate this phishing attack, as identified in WAHH context.
Trigger company-wide security alert notification regarding the 'it-support-portal.net' phishing campaign.
